terrain_base.description: Base terrain class. WATER tiles may host bridge-roads (road_level>0).

terrain_type.description: Visual/logic terrain type (T1). WATER covers all water tiles including rivers.

is_river.description: River flag (R1). A river tile is WATER + is_river=true. No gameplay difference from regular water; used for generation/visuals.

resource_type.description: Resource contained in this tile (if any).

resource_remaining.description: Remaining resource stock on this tile.

resource_yield_per_turn.description: Per-turn extraction amount once harvesting has started.

harvest_started.description: Whether harvesting has been started on this tile.

harvest_owner_civ_id.description: Civ id that started harvesting (if started).

depleted_low_productivity.description: After resource_remaining reaches 0, tile may switch to low productivity state.

road_level.description: 0 = no road. 1..3 indicates road level (MaxRoadLevel=3). If terrain_base=WATER and road_level>0, this is a bridge-road.

road_owner_civ_id.description: Owner civ of the road on this tile, if any.

port_level.description: Port level (0 = no port, 1..3 = L1..L3; MaxPortLevel=3). port_level >= 1 means port exists.

port_owner_civ_id.description: Owner civ of the port on this tile, if any.

city_id.description: If this tile is the city center, city_id references the City entity.

territory_city_id.description: City whose territory includes this tile (borders are city borders).

territory_owner_civ_id.description: Civ that controls the territory of this tile (usually derived from territory_city_id).
